medical_history.chief_complaint: Status epilepticus due to profound hypomagnesemia
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Developed recurrent urinary tract infections (UTIs), neurogenic bladder dysfunction, proteinuria, partial Fanconi syndrome, bladder calculus, and left non-obstructing renal calculi
medical_history.past_medical_history: Severe developmental delay, microcephaly, spastic dystonic diplegia, facial dysmorphism, respiratory distress due to tracheomalacia, seizures, hypomagnesemia, renal tubulopathy
